title: Owner-scoped project CRUD with task cascade
body:
## Goal
Give a signed-in user full CRUD over their own projects with strict per-owner isolation and a delete that cascades to contained tasks.

## Changes
- {"path":"src/routes/projects.js","assumption":"creates"}
- {"path":"tests/projects.test.js","assumption":"creates"}

## Acceptance
- [ ] `POST /projects` with `{name}` from a signed-in user responds with the created project `{id, name, ownerId, createdAt}` owned by that user.
- [ ] `GET /projects` responds with a JSON array containing only the caller's own projects and no other user's projects.
- [ ] `GET /projects/:id` and `DELETE /projects/:id` return 404 for a project the caller does not own or that does not exist.
- [ ] Deleting a project also deletes every task belonging to that project.
- [ ] All `/projects` endpoints return 401 when the bearer token is missing or invalid.
- [ ] `node --test tests/projects.test.js` exits 0.

## Verify
- node --test tests/projects.test.js (contract)
- npm run typecheck (validate)

> 🏷️ Authored with Mandrel v0.0.0 · 2026-07-12

<!-- meta: {"reason_to_exist":"Deliver the project capability as a distinct user-visible surface (c: folding projects into the foundation or tasks Story would exceed the one-pass delivery envelope for a full ownership-scoped CRUD surface).","mandrel_version":"0.0.0","authored_at":"2026-07-12"} -->
